name: Angel Cake with Mocha Butter Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large dry bowl, sift together powdered sugar and cake flour. Add salt.
2. In another large bowl, whisk egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add cream of tartar.
3. Gradually add granulated sugar to the egg whites while continuously whisking.
4. Sift 1/3 of the flour mixture over the egg whites and lightly fold in.
5. Repeat with the remaining flour mixture, adding it gradually.
6. Turn the batter into a large ungreased tube pan and smooth the top.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes or until the cake is done. Cool the cake completely.
8. Loosen around the edges, remove the cake from the pan.
9. To make the butter cream, beat butter until very soft and smooth. Add instant coffee, cocoa powder, and powdered sugar. Beat until very light.
10. Spread the butter cream mixture between layers and around the cake.
11. Garnish with chocolate sprinkles.
